abstract:
NLP-026 Benefits of Hugging Face Transformers library?

 26. Benefits of Hugging Face Transformers library?
答案要点:
优势:
- 统一 API (BERT, GPT, T5, etc.)
- 预训练模型库 (100k+)
- 微调工具 (Trainer API)
- 部署支持 (ONNX, TorchScript)
- 活跃社区

质量评分: 93/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
